item.title: LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces here: ℹ️: Celebrate the iconic series with this Star Wars 40th Anniversary set, a LEGO brick version of the iconic AT-AT Walker Star Wars building toy Includes 6 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Luke Skywalker, General Veers, 2 AT-AT Drivers and 2 Snowtroopers, all with weapons The Star Wars AT-AT figure features posable legs, a posable head with opening cockpit for 3 minifigures and spring-loaded shooters This set will impress for sure when put on display, and it makes a fantastic LEGO Star Wars gift for kids, boys and girls aged 10 plus This iconic AT-AT Walker also has foldout panels, a speeder bike, winch and bottom hatch so Luke can throw in the thermal detonator element 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hagrid’s Hut: An Unexpected Visit Toy House for 8 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls Includes Dragon and Dog Figures plus 5 Character Minifigures Hermione & Ron Gift Idea 76428
item.description: You can find LEGO Harry Potter Hagrid’s Hut: An Unexpected Visit Toy House for 8 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls Includes Dragon and Dog Figures plus 5 Character Minifigures Hermione & Ron Gift Idea 76428 with a discount here: ℹ️: Buildable Wizarding World toys – LEGO Harry Potter sets let young wizards, witches and Muggles play out favourite scenes, make up their own adventures or simply display the models LEGO Harry Potter toy for kids’ – Recreate Harry Potter and friends’ unexpected visit to Rubeus Hagrid’s hut, an iconic Wizarding World location 2 of 14 collectible Hogwarts portraits – Includes gold-coloured elements printed with 2 of 14 random Hogwarts portraits to display in the hut Gift idea for kids – This set makes a fun treat or Harry Potter-themed Christmas gift for 8 plus year old girls, boys and kids who love Harry Potter toys and characters Buildable hut – Features a removable roof and opens for easy play, plus the interior includes Hagrid’s recliner, an umbrella stand and a dragon egg More Harry Potter characters – The building toy for kids also includes LEGO figures of Norbert the dragon and Hagrid’s dog, Fang 7 LEGO Harry Potter characters – Includes Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, Ron Weasley, Draco Malfoy and Rubeus Hagrid LEGO Harry Potter minifigures 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Centre Vet Set Animal Care Building Toy for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Girls and Boys with Otter Seahorse and Turtle Figures 41736
item.description: You can find LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Centre Vet Set Animal Care Building Toy for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Girls and Boys with Otter Seahorse and Turtle Figures 41736 with a discount here: ℹ️: After rescue missions kids turn the knob to push animals down the slide to the building toy rehabilition area until they can return to the ocean Animal-lovers discover the ocean and learn to take care of otters and other toy sea animals with this LEGO Friends Sea Rescue vet set for kids This set makes a great gift for kids, girls, boys 7+ years old; plus, LEGO Builder app lets zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress The playset includes a 3-level building with radar, wind turbine and a slide, a water scooter, a rehabilitation area and LEGO ocean scene Includes accessories: a life jacket, brush, feeding bottle, walkie-talkie, treasure chest, camera, microscope, syringe and an X-ray machine Kids can rescue and care for the sea otters using the water scooter then head inside to clean, X-ray and feed the otter animal figures This vet toy comes with Leo, Kayla and animal-loving Autumn mini-dolls, plus toy animals; 2 sea otters, a seahorse and a sea turtle figures 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Architecture Notre-Dame de Paris Set Model Kit for Adults to Build Home or Office Décor Collectible Gift for Lovers of History Men Women Him or Her 21061
item.description: You can find LEGO Architecture Notre-Dame de Paris Set Model Kit for Adults to Build Home or Office Décor Collectible Gift for Lovers of History Men Women Him or Her 21061 with a discount here: ℹ️: Step-by-step guide – The included instruction booklet features the Notre-Dame story and an interview with the LEGO designer of this model Authentically detailed – Admire the rose windows, remove the roof to view interior columns and arches and lift off the towers to take a look inside LEGO Paris set – Your building journey follows that of the actual Notre-Dame cathedral, starting with its curved back and ending with the spire LEGO gift for adults – This collectible LEGO Paris set makes a fun Christmas gift for men, women, him, her, or a friend who is a lover of history, architecture, travel or France LEGO Sets for Adults – This LEGO Architecture Landmarks Collection model is part of an assortment of premium-quality building sets for adults like you who enjoy hands-on creative activities Notre-Dame de Paris model – Experience every step in the evolution of an iconic Paris landmark with this LEGO Architecture building set for adults Paris decorations for home or office décor – Place buildable trees along one side of the cathedral and attach the nameplate to the base 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Technic 2022 Ford GT Car Model Kit for Adults to Build 1:12 Scale Supercar with Authentic Features Advanced Building Set Collectible Gift For Men & Women 42154
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic 2022 Ford GT Car Model Kit for Adults to Build 1:12 Scale Supercar with Authentic Features Advanced Building Set Collectible Gift For Men & Women 42154 here: ℹ️: Take your time assembling details like the rear-wheel drive with differential, opening doors, adjustable spoiler wing and opening bonnet With its classic dark blue finish with white racing stripes, this LEGO Technic model car kit for adults makes a stunning display piece Part of an innovative collection of LEGO model car kits for adults to build, this set includes the LEGO Builder app with digital instructions Number of Pieces: 1,466 This LEGO supercar model is designed for adult builders, offering a detailed building project, and makes a great gift for men and women to add to their LEGO vehicle collection Enjoy a rewarding building experience shaping every detail of the 2022 Ford GT with this 1:12 scale LEGO Technic car model kit for adults The model car includes authentic features, such as a V6 engine with moving pistons, independent suspension on all wheels and front-axle steering 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre Modular Building Set Toy Birthday Gift Idea for Kids Girls Boys with Art and Recording Studios Gaming Room plus Pickle the Dog and More 41748
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre Modular Building Set Toy Birthday Gift Idea for Kids Girls Boys with Art and Recording Studios Gaming Room plus Pickle the Dog and More 41748 at the following link: ℹ️: Includes a music room, recording studio, chill out zone, art studio, pool and greenhouse, plus slide and platform to move from one floor to another The model building kit includes lots of toy art, a sewing machine, music, gardening and gaming accessories so kids can create their own scenes Includes LEGO Friends Paisley, Liann, Olly, Nova, Zac mini-dolls and Pickle the dog, plus Stephanie, one of the original characters, who became Heartlake City mayor The modular style of this building toy lets kids arrange the various levels to create their own design, then switch it up whenever they want The construction toy features a crane to access the side of the building for kids to work on the mural, plus a stage with a dancing function This LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre modular building set features 5 floors, each with different areas for kids to explore Expand the fun: This set combines with the LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Kitchen 41747 (sold separately) for even bigger stories 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Ideas Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera Set for Adults Collectible Vintage Model Kit to Build with Authentic Details Creative Father s Day Treat Photography Gifts for Men Women Him & Her 21345
item.description: You can find LEGO Ideas Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera Set for Adults Collectible Vintage Model Kit to Build with Authentic Details Creative Father s Day Treat Photography Gifts for Men Women Him & Her 21345 with a discount here: ℹ️: Gift idea for photography-lovers – Treat yourself or give this LEGO set for adults as a creative Christmas gift for men, women, him or her, or as a thoughtful anniversary present for a husband or wife Step-by-step guide – Includes an illustrated booklet featuring interviews with the set’s fan designer and LEGO designers, plus instructions to guide every step of the creative building experience For camera-lovers – Design features of this model kit for adults to build include the viewfinder, Colour Spectrum and exposure compensation dial Collectible LEGO set for adults – Create your own brick-built replica of the iconic Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera with this LEGO set for adults Operates like a real vintage Polaroid camera model – Load one of the ‘photos’ into the camera and press the red shutter button to eject it LEGO camera with authentic details – This collectible set also includes a ‘Polaroid Land Camera’ sticker and choice of ‘OneStep’ or ‘1000’ stickers Buildable Time-Zero Land Film pack – Contains 3 illustrated ‘photos’ of Polaroid inventor Edwin H.

item.title: LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance Set for Adults to Build Scale Formula One Race Car Model Building Kit Collectible Home or Office Décor Birthday Gifts for men Women Him or Her 42171
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance Set for Adults to Build Scale Formula One Race Car Model Building Kit Collectible Home or Office Décor Birthday Gifts for men Women Him or Her 42171 here: ℹ️: Authentic features – Includes the differential and 6-cylinder engine with moving pistons, plus an opening wing inspired by the real-world car’s DRS Mercedes F1 model car – This LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance model kit for adults to build is packed with authentic details Test the steering – Features include slick tyres, plus steering that can be controlled using the steering wheel or the knob on top of the model car A racing car gift project for adults – This model car kit makes a rewarding Christmas gift for men and women, a thoughtful anniversary present for a husband or wife, or as a just-because treat for adult fans of motorsport 3D building instructions – The LEGO Builder app lets you save sets, track your progress, zoom in and rotate your model car in 3D Display piece – With authentic livery details, this LEGO set for adults can be admired from every angle, and makes a great home or office décor piece 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Technic THE BATMAN – BATCYCLE Set Collectible Toy Motorbike Scale Model Building Kit of the Iconic Super Hero Bike from 2022 Movie 42155
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Technic THE BATMAN – BATCYCLE Set Collectible Toy Motorbike Scale Model Building Kit of the Iconic Super Hero Bike from 2022 Movie 42155 at the following link: ℹ️: This collectible LEGO THE BATMAN - BATCYCLE features a supporting kickstand so kids can display their build with pride on a shelf or desk This motorbike model building kit makes a great Batman gift idea for kids aged 9+ and fans of super heroes, toy vehicles and comic book culture The Batman Bike is packed with realistic features including steering, suspension and a drive chain that connects the H4 engine to the rear wheel Kids and fans can capture the spirit of the DC superhero and build the toy motorbike piece by piece then recreate their favourite Batman moments Fans can recreate an iconic vehicle with this LEGO Technic BATCYCLE toy motorbike model building kit, as seen in the 2022 movie: THE BATMAN 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars The Dark Falcon Starship Set Vehicle Building Toy for 10 Plus Year Old Boys & Girls with 6 Minifigures Incl. C-3PO Birthday Gift for Kids and Fans 75389
item.description: You can find LEGO Star Wars The Dark Falcon Starship Set Vehicle Building Toy for 10 Plus Year Old Boys & Girls with 6 Minifigures Incl. C-3PO Birthday Gift for Kids and Fans 75389 with a discount here: ℹ️: Collectible building toys for all ages – LEGO Star Wars sets enable kids and adult Star Wars fans to recreate classic scenes, create their own adventures or simply display the buildable models LEGO vehicle – Features a removable cockpit for 2 minifigures, spring-loaded shooters, cannons, a gunner post for 2 minifigures and a radar dish Easy access – Flip up the top panels to reveal the interior, which includes a removable throne for Darth Jar Jar, command centre, hyperdrive and more LEGO Star Wars building toy for kids – The Dark Falcon, a dark version of the Millennium Falcon as seen in the Rebuild the Galaxy Disney+ special Part of the LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy collection – Look out for 75388 Jedi Bob’s Starfighter and 75393 TIE Fighter & X-Wing Mash-up sets, sold separately 6 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Darth Jar Jar, Bounty Hunter C-3PO, Darth Dev, Darth Rey, Beach Luke and Jedi Vader, plus lightsabers and more Fun Star Wars gift for kids – This LEGO Star Wars Starship set makes a great birthday gift for 10-plus-year-old boys, girls and Star Wars fans 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Technic Mercedes-Benz G 500 PROFESSIONAL Line Building Set Model Car Kit for Adults to Build Collectible 4X4 Off-Road Vehicle Gift for Men Women Him or Her 42177
item.description: You can find LEGO Technic Mercedes-Benz G 500 PROFESSIONAL Line Building Set Model Car Kit for Adults to Build Collectible 4X4 Off-Road Vehicle Gift for Men Women Him or Her 42177 with a discount here: ℹ️: LEGO Technic set – Celebrate the 45th anniversary of one of the world’s best-loved off-roaders with this Mercedes-Benz G 500 PROFESSIONAL Line model Functions to explore – Check out the 6-cylinder in-line piston engine, gearbox with its drive, neutral and reverse settings and 2 differential locks Build a G-Class model car – This model kit for adults to build includes authentic features, such as the working steering and the raised suspension Detailed LEGO vehicle – This set for adults features opening doors, a ladder, spare wheel and a roof rack, plus an opening tailgate and bonnet A Mercedes-Benz collectible car gift – This LEGO Technic set makes a great gift idea for men and women, including adult LEGO builders and Mercedes-Benz fans with a project to enjoy and a display piece to cherish Engaging building instructions – Get ready to build like never before with the LEGO Builder app, where you can save sets and track your progress 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO City Cargo Train Toys for Kids Boys 7 Girls Aged 6 plus Years Old Remote Control Set Battery Powered Engine with Bluetooth Connection 3 Wagons and Tracks 60198
item.description: You can find LEGO City Cargo Train Toys for Kids Boys 7 Girls Aged 6 plus Years Old Remote Control Set Battery Powered Engine with Bluetooth Connection 3 Wagons and Tracks 60198 with a discount here: ℹ️: Also includes a control center with signal lights, toy train tracks with 16 curved rails, 16 straight rails and a railroad switch with lever Includes a motorized engine with 10-speed Bluetooth remote control, pantograph on the opening roof, and driver’s cabin with control panel Kids can push the lever on the LEGO train track switch to drive the remote control train toy to a different track for loading or unloading Includes 6 LEGO City minifigures: 4 train workers, a security officer and a crook for imaginative role-play with this LEGO train set for kids LEGO City Train toys and sets with battery powered up motors (batteries not included) are a first-class Christmas or Birthday gifts for kids, boys and girls The Cargo Train set for kids aged 6+ years old features a battery powered train toy with 4 cars, plus a control centre, armoured truck and forklift toys 🛒 Buy it!
